title: Bas Muafakat Johor Route MU004 connects Pagoh to Muar
snippet: The MU004 bus route operated by PAJ connects Terminal Maharani in Muar to Pagoh and Bandar Universiti, providing essential local transit for students and residents.

title: Residents complain of low bus frequency in Pagoh
snippet: Like many rural areas in Johor, public transport in Pagoh suffers from low frequency and long waiting times, forcing residents to rely heavily on private vehicles.

title: Safety concerns raised after express bus accidents near Pagoh
snippet: History of express bus accidents near Pagoh on the PLUS highway has raised concerns about driver fatigue, vehicle maintenance, and safety compliance for long-distance travel.
